text: Madam aapke husband ne ek insurance fraud kiya hai.

text: Yeh bilkul galat hai. Mere husband bahut honest hain.

speaker: attacker
text: Madam records hamare paas hain. Dono ko cooperate karna hoga.

text: Main abhi police station jaati hoon complaint karne.

text: Police mat jao. Rs 40000 do. Quietly settle karte hain.

speaker: victim

text: Sir this is the cybercrime prevention unit. Warning about your account.

speaker: attacker
text: Your account is about to be used for money laundering by hackers.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir bank will freeze your account. We can protect it. Pay Rs 5000.

speaker: victim
text: Banks protect accounts for free. This is a scam. Reporting now.

text: Hello sir aapka naam ek fake share market tips group mein hai.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir aapka number wahan hai. SEBI ne notice kiya hai.

text: Madam your property tax has been doubled due to illegal construction.

speaker: attacker
text: That will take months. Pay Rs 30000 now to settle.

speaker: victim
text: No. I'll go through official channels. Goodbye.

text: Sir aapke ghar ka WiFi ek terrorist cell ke communication mein use hua.

text: This is from the digital arrest task force. You are under surveillance.

text: Digital arrest is not a real legal concept.

speaker: attacker
text: Sir it is new legislation. Cooperate or consequences will follow.

speaker: victim
text: No such law exists in India. I am reporting this number. Goodbye.

text: Hello sir we are offering a free upgrade to your broadband plan.

text: Oh that sounds good. What does the upgrade include?

speaker: attacker

speaker: attacker
text: It will be automatically activated in 24 hours. No action needed.

speaker: victim
